code:
import io
import string
import list

fn parse_line(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut has_digit = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(s)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(s, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        has_digit = true
      else if b == 45 and not has_digit
        sign = -1
      else
        if has_digit
          result = list.push(result, cur * sign)
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          has_digit = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if has_digit
    result = list.push(result, cur * sign)
  end
  result
end

fn remove_first(_ xs: List<Int>, _ target: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut removed = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = list.len(xs)
  while i < n
    match list.get(xs, i)
    when Some(v)
      if v == target and not removed
        removed = true
      else
        result = list.push(result, v)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn line_or_empty(_ o: Option<String>) -> String
  match o
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let l1 = line_or_empty(io.read_line())
let l2 = line_or_empty(io.read_line())

let a = parse_line(l1)
let b = parse_line(l2)

mut combined: List<Int> = []
for v in a
  if not list.contains(combined, v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  end
end
for v in b
  if not list.contains(combined, v)
    combined = list.push(combined, v)
  end
end

mut sorted: List<Int> = []
mut working = combined
while list.len(working) > 0
  match list.min(working)
  when Some(m)
    sorted = list.push(sorted, m)
    working = remove_first(working, m)
  when None
    ()
  end
end

mut out = ""
mut first = true
for v in sorted
  if first
    out = "#{v}"
    first = false
  else
    out = "#{out} #{v}"
  end
end
println(out)
